questions.text: What's your go-to order at a coffee shop? Like, when you need caffeine and a change of scenery — do you get something consistent every time, or do you mix it up based on mood/season? Any specific drink that hits different?

When you're shopping for yourself — not gifts for someone else — how do you prefer to do it? Are you someone who researches the hell out of something before buying, or do you more like to see it in person and decide on the spot? Online vs. in-store for different types of things?

How do you handle the seasonal switch between Mexico and the US? Like, do you have a ritual or checklist for when you leave one place and go to the other? Any specific way you prep mentally or practically for that big of a change every few months?

Do you have any outdoor or nature-related activities you like to do when you're not working? Like hiking, swimming, surfing, running outside, or just hanging out in parks/nature? Any preference for the type of nature experience?

What about podcasts, YouTube channels, or newsletters — is there anything you regularly consume for learning or just for fun? Any specific creators or shows you'd recommend to someone who knows what you like?
